T0364.title: House Boss
T0364.definition: 在赌博黑产中，“摇把子”指掌控整个赌场运营、调度资金与人手的一把手负责人。
T0364.description: The boss typically does not participate directly at the table but orchestrates operations from behind the scenes, overseeing venue rental, recruitment, fund pool management, and external security to ensure the game runs continuously. They form a vertical management chain with roles like the middleman and table manager, and are often the first to cut ties and move assets when trouble arises. In online casinos, the boss may act as a platform administrator, remotely manipulating odds, closing bets, and consolidating funds.
